{{Quote|Welcome to the Yard. I am A-3T0. Come with me, fellow scum.|A-3TO|<ref name="Journal 8" />}}
'''A-3TO''' was a green-plated [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who welcomed any [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] or [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] visiting [[The Yard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Valgauth/Legends|Valgauth]]. He helped them get in touch with [[Syndicate One]].<ref name="Journal 8" />
